keyEvents.text: Goal! Norway 0, France 1. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.
Patrick Berg (Norway) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
